translation.literal_translation: If one says 'not so, because of small abode and such designation,' no; because this is due to focused contemplation - like space. (7)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.7: arbhakaukas/minuteness language does not force jiva-reference; it is upasana-conditioned, analogous to localized speech about all-pervasive space.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra answer to the locality-size objection.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit upadhi/vyavahara terminology and atta-grahana technical choices in records 1.2.016-1.2.022.
